Class CharacterSelectScene

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
javafx.scene.layout.StackPane
component.scene1.CharacterSelectScene
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class CharacterSelectScene extends javafx.scene.layout.StackPane
Character selection scene shown before the match starts.

This screen lets both players:

  • Browse character cards.
  • Preview selected characters.
  • Confirm or cancel picks in a two-step flow.

  • Field Details

    • selectedPane

      private CharacterPane selectedPane
      Currently highlighted character tile, or null if none selected.

    • playerSelection

      private final PlayerSelection playerSelection
      Top status bar that displays current player selections.

    • player1PreviewImage

      private final javafx.scene.image.ImageView player1PreviewImage
      Large image preview for player 1 selection.

    • player2PreviewImage

      private final javafx.scene.image.ImageView player2PreviewImage
      Large image preview for player 2 selection.

    • selectState

      private SelectState selectState
      Selection state machine: player 1 selection, player 2 selection, then done.

  • Constructor Details

    • CharacterSelectScene

      public CharacterSelectScene()
      Builds the full character selection UI, binds input handlers, and starts scene BGM.

  • Method Details

    • setImageBackground

      private void setImageBackground()
      Applies the background image for this screen using cover behavior.

    • selectCharacter

      private void selectCharacter(CharacterPane pane)
      Updates highlighted character card so only one card is selected at a time.
      Parameters:
      pane - character card clicked by the user

    • confirmSelection

      private void confirmSelection()
      Processes current selection and advances the two-player selection flow.

      Once both players are confirmed, transitions to Scene2.

    • cancelSelection

      private void cancelSelection()
      Cancels current step and rolls selection flow back by one stage.

    • createPreviewImageView

      private javafx.scene.image.ImageView createPreviewImageView()
      Creates a standardized preview image node for player preview panels.
      Returns:
      configured preview ImageView

    • loadCharacterImage

      private javafx.scene.image.Image loadCharacterImage(String characterName)
      Loads the portrait image for a character.
      Parameters:
      characterName - character identifier used in resource naming
      Returns:
      character portrait image, or fallback image when missing

    • createNewCharacter

      private Character createNewCharacter(String name)
      Creates a new character instance from selected character name.

      Returned as base type Character to keep downstream logic polymorphic.

      Parameters:
      name - selected character name
      Returns:
      newly created concrete character object
